shortDescription: Discover the SEL11F18 from Sony.With an 11 mm (35mm full-frame equivalent: 16.5 mm) focal length for dynamic ultra-wide images and a large F1.8 max. aperture for deep bokeh, this lens weighs just 181 g (6.4 oz.). Discover the SEL1224GM from Sony.At the 12-mm end of its range, this 12–24-mm constant F2.8 zoom lens offers an ultra-wide angle of view. An innovative optical design works with Sony's advanced XD Linear Motors to deliver outstanding G Master image quality in a lightweight lens that also features fast, precise auto focus, smooth control and solid reliability.

Discover the SEL14F18GM from Sony.This large-aperture ultra-wide-angle prime lens offers G Master quality in an innovative design that is incredibly compact. Advanced technology achieves breathtaking resolution plus exquisite bokeh even at maximum F1.8 aperture. Add fast, precise AF and extraordinary mobility, and you have a lens that can capture fresh views of everyday scenes.

Discover the SEL15F14G from Sony.With great G Lens rendering and expressive F1.4 bokeh, this 15-mm (35-mm full-frame equivalent: 22.5 mm) wide-angle prime lens for APS-C bodies delivers dynamic perspectives. Whether shooting stills or movies, superb operability and AF performance combine with compact, lightweight portability for multifaceted versatility.

Discover the SEL1635GM2 from Sony.The FE 16–35 mm F2.8 GM II delivers dynamic wide-angle perspectives with extraordinary resolution and bokeh while maximising the speed and performance of advanced camera bodies. Unequalled AF performance provides significant advantages for stills and movies in a versatile lens that is also the smallest and lightest%footnote_id="CameraNF1218LensSEL1635GM2"% of its kind.

Discover the SEL2070G from Sony.Redefines the standard zoom category with a focal length range that extends from ultra-wide 20 mm to 70 mm in a remarkably compact, lightweight full-frame lens with maximum aperture constant at F4.

Discover the SEL20F18G from Sony.Sony's latest optical technology achieves impressive corner-to-corner resolution from maximum F1.8 aperture in a large-aperture wide-angle prime lens. It is also remarkably compact, and matched with an E-mount body makes up a versatile, mobile system with outstanding AF performance, control and reliability for a wide variety of shooting needs.
Discover the SEL2450G from Sony.

Discover the SEL24F28G from Sony.This wide-angle prime lens packs the high image quality and beautiful bokeh of the G Lens into a compact design with superb build quality and intuitive operability. Easily carried anywhere, it's ideal for wide-angle shots of views that catch the eye. The fast, precise and quiet AF is ideal for shooting both stills and movies, ensuring capture of those vital moments.

Discover the SEL2860 from Sony. The latest mechanical and optical technology delivers full-frame performance in the world's lightest and most compact standard zoom lens. Although the FE 28–60 mm F4–5.6 is designed for easy carrying in your bag for daily use, it features a focal length of 28 mm–60 mm to expand your full-frame reach.

Discover the SEL300F28GM from Sony.The SEL300F28GM is the lightest large-aperture telephoto prime lens in its class%footnote_id="CameraNF1310lensSEL300F28GM"%, delivering outstanding optical performance and rendering plus astonishingly fast, precise AF in a versatile lens that weighs just 1 470 grams (51.9 oz.). (Excluding tripod mount) The lens has been designed so that its weight is not concentrated near the front, in order to give the best balance. This can minimise stress and fatigue during long handheld shooting sessions.

It is also remarkably compact and lightweight—for new creative freedom.
